# Package Next Fixture

## Overview

Exercises PKG-001: `aps next --package` filtering and `--by-package` grouping,
with tag inheritance (module column) and an untagged bucket.

## Problem & Success Criteria

Filtered next resolves per package; the grouped queue shows (untagged) last.
